requirement_topic.zh: 接口兼容性——GB/T 20234 与 IEC 62196
requirement_topic.zht: 接口相容性——GB/T 20234 與 IEC 62196

summary.en: IEC 62196 is the international plug, socket-outlet, vehicle connector, and vehicle inlet series used with conductive EV charging systems. Philippines-bound chargers should confirm the connector configuration required by the project, vehicle fleet, utility, or authority before shipment; IEC 62196 Type 1, Type 2, CCS, CHAdeMO, and other configurations are not physically interchangeable with China-only GB/T 20234 hardware.
summary.zh: IEC 62196 是传导式电动汽车充电系统所用插头、插座、车辆连接器和车辆插座的国际系列标准。面向菲律宾的充电桩在出货前应确认项目、车辆车队、电力公司或主管机关要求的接口配置；IEC 62196 Type 1、Type 2、CCS、CHAdeMO 等配置与仅按中国 GB/T 20234 设计的硬件不可物理互换。
summary.zht: IEC 62196 是傳導式電動汽車充電系統所用插頭、插座、車輛連接器和車輛插座的國際系列標準。面向菲律賓的充電樁在出貨前應確認項目、車輛車隊、電力公司或主管機關要求的接口配置；IEC 62196 Type 1、Type 2、CCS、CHAdeMO 等配置與僅按中國 GB/T 20234 設計的硬體不可物理互換。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific Philippines EV fleet connector specification

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234 for AC and DC charging couplers, with China-specific geometry, pin allocation, control pilot, and DC communication assumptions. A GB/T 20234 connector set should be treated as a redesign item for Philippines deployments that specify IEC 62196-based connectors.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用 GB/T 20234 作为交流和直流充电连接装置，具有中国特定的几何形状、针脚配置、控制导引和直流通信假设。若菲律宾部署项目指定 IEC 62196 类接口，应将 GB/T 20234 接口组件视为需要重新设计的项目。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用 GB/T 20234 作為交流和直流充電連接裝置，具有中國特定的幾何形狀、針腳配置、控制導引和直流通訊假設。若菲律賓部署項目指定 IEC 62196 類接口，應將 GB/T 20234 接口組件視為需要重新設計的項目。

gap.en: The connector gap is physical and protocol-level. Exporters should redesign couplers, sockets, locking, proximity / control-pilot circuits, DC charging communication, labelling, and spare-part strategy around the Philippines project connector route rather than assuming an adapter can close the compliance gap.
gap.zh: 接口差距属于物理和协议层差距。出口商应围绕菲律宾项目的接口路线重新设计耦合器、插座、锁止、接近/控制导引电路、直流充电通信、标签和备件策略，而不应假定适配器即可弥合合规差距。
gap.zht: 接口差距屬於物理和協議層差距。出口商應圍繞菲律賓項目的接口路線重新設計耦合器、插座、鎖止、接近/控制導引電路、直流充電通訊、標籤和備件策略，而不應假定轉接器即可彌合合規差距。

mandatory_status.target: Market and project interoperability requirement; mandatory where specified by procurement, permit condition, utility interconnection, or authority, but not stated here as a blanket whole-unit certification rule
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is the China domestic connector baseline and is not a substitute for IEC 62196 connector compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A GB/T 20234-only connector design should not be treated as Philippines-ready where the destination project expects IEC 62196-family interoperability. Confirm the exact connector route before certification testing and production tooling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当菲律宾目的项目预期采用 IEC 62196 系列互操作时，仅支持 GB/T 20234 的接口设计不应视为已适配菲律宾。应在认证测试和量产工装前确认确切接口路线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當菲律賓目的項目預期採用 IEC 62196 系列互操作時，僅支援 GB/T 20234 的接口設計不應視為已適配菲律賓。應在認證測試和量產工裝前確認確切接口路線。
